title: Repair a broken feed publication timestamp decode
goal: Restore the feed publishing flow so the project accepts its published timestamp payload and prints ok again.
initialPrompt: A Sigil project now fails while decoding a published timestamp for a feed entry. Find the smallest coherent fix so running the program prints ok again. Use any Sigil tooling you want, but keep the patch inside the allowed source paths.
successCriteria: The patch stays inside the allowed source paths.
